jd_text:
UnlockLand is an AI-driven PropTech company recognized as one of the top innovators in the “Future of Lifestyle” PropTech Accelerator, led by the National Information Technology Development Program (NITDP) and the Real Estate General Authority (REGA) under Saudi Vision 2030.
 Our mission is to transform how developers, investors, and governments plan, evaluate, and optimize real-estate assets. 
UnlockLand’s AI Operating System integrates geospatial data, financial modelling, and regulatory intelligence to deliver instant feasibility studies and predictive analytics — helping cities and investors build smarter, more sustainable communities.
As we scale across North America, the Middle East, and Asia, UnlockLand is seeking a Vice President of Finance to lead our financial strategy, operational excellence, and investment planning. This executive leader will ensure the company’s financial structure supports rapid global expansion, enterprise partnerships, and large-scale real estate intelligence programs.
As we expand across North America, the Middle East, and Asia, UnlockLand is seeking a Vice President of Operations & Global Expansion to architect scalable systems, optimize cross-functional execution, and drive operational excellence across continents. This leader will ensure UnlockLand’s operational backbone supports rapid adoption, enterprise partnerships, and national-level PropTech initiatives.
This is a high-impact role for an operations executive with deep experience in fast-growth SaaS/AI environments, international expansion, and real estate or smart-city ecosystems.
Key ResponsibilitiesOperational Strategy & ExecutionBuild and implement UnlockLand’s global operations strategy across delivery, workflow design, and cross-functional scaling.Define operational KPIs, systems, and processes to support fast, multi-market expansion.Lead organizational planning and performance management during growth phases.Global Expansion & Market EnablementArchitect localization frameworks for new countries—covering regulations, workflows, pricing, and operational compliance.Oversee setup of international service delivery, support functions, and enterprise deployment models.Ensure smooth onboarding and adoption for government ministries, REITs, developers, and enterprise clients.Operational Systems, Process Automation & QualityBuild scalable internal systems integrating data ops, finance ops, product ops, and customer success workflows.Partner with AI and Product teams to define operational automation opportunities.Establish global quality standards and risk-mitigation practices.Cross-Functional LeadershipCollaborate closely with Product, AI, Finance, and GTM teams to accelerate adoption and improve customer outcomes.Support pricing, packaging, and cost-structure decisions for enterprise markets.Translate market insights into operational requirements for new features, geographies, and product modules.Partnerships, Enterprise Delivery & Stakeholder ManagementOversee enterprise onboarding operations for ministries, planning authorities, and national development programs.Strengthen strategic alliances with ecosystem partners, innovation hubs, accelerators, and industry associations.Provide executive-level reporting on operational performance, expansion readiness, and customer delivery.QualificationsBachelor’s / Master’s degree in Business, Operations, Engineering, Real Estate, or related fields (MBA preferred).12+ years of operations leadership experience in SaaS, AI, PropTech, enterprise software, or global scaling environments.Demonstrated success building and scaling international operations, especially across government, infrastructure, or real-estate sectors.Strong expertise in process design, systems implementation, and cross-market localization.Exceptional leadership, communication, project management, and change-management skills.Proven track record partnering with C-suite, government bodies, and enterprise clients.What We OfferCompetitive executive compensation + performance incentives + equity participation.Opportunity to build the global operational foundation of a rapidly scaling AI PropTech company.Direct collaboration with AI R&D, product, finance, and government partnerships teams.Leadership role in modernization programs shaping the future of real estate development worldwide.
